raw: {"plans":[[[3],[3],[3],[3],[3]],[[1],[1],[1],[1],[1]],[[3],[3],[3],[1],[1]]],"rationale":"The only apparent controllable piece is the 1-block at the bottom-right edge on the 9 floor. A coherent first maneuver is to move left along the bottom platform toward the main structure; if direction mapping differs, the alternate probes upward/diagonal entry movement while staying near the accessible edge."}
